paneContent:
в”‚ echo "New widget: $NEW_ID"
  в”‚ 
  в”‚ # Connect to me
  в”‚ curl -s -X POST "${STORYBOARD_SERVER_URL}/_storyboard/canvas/connector" \
  в”‚ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  в”‚ -d "{\"name\":\"${STORYBOARD_CANVAS_ID}\",\"startWidgetId\":\"${STORYBOARD_WIDGET_ID}
  в”‚ \",\"endWidgetId\":\"${NEW_ID}\",\"startAnchor\":\"right\",\"endAnchor\":\"left\"}"
  в”” 4 lines

в—Џ Done. Here's what I implemented:

  Server (POST /widget + batch create-widget) вЂ” when no --x/--y or --near is provided,
  auto-positions using:

   1. Source agent/terminal вЂ” source field in the request body (CLI auto-sends
  $STORYBOARD_WIDGET_ID)
   2. Selected widget вЂ” from .selectedwidgets.json (same canvas)
   3. Viewport center вЂ” user's current view
   4. Last canvas widget вЂ” right of it
   5. Origin вЂ” only for truly empty canvases

  Opt-out: --near false disables auto-positioning. Explicit --x/--y also overrides it.

  Files changed: server.js, canvasAdd.js, schemas.js, selectedWidgets.js, SKILL.md,
  AGENTS.md. Pushed to 4.3.0--prompt-widget.

 ~/workspace/st... [вЋ‡ 4.3.0--prompt-widget*%]
